summary: After confirmed initialization in a fresh project, agent_next now routes initialized_no_active_contract to nori-acceptance with instructions to reuse the user's already stated goal when present, ask only if the goal is missing, and run acceptance discovery before implementation. Packaged nori and nori-acceptance Skills carry the same behavior so users are not asked to repeat a goal they already provided.
reviewability: Rerun the temporary-project init/doctor smoke and inspect agent_next.instruction plus packaged Skill text for the already-stated-goal rule.
limitations: This proves routing semantics after project initialization; the next dogfood step should evaluate the actual acceptance discovery questions and draft quality.
